query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.matchedBusinessLines,
  p.stage,
  p.actionTier,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.priority IN ('hot','warm')
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus IS NULL OR p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('archived','stale','dead'))
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.stage, p.actionTier
HAVING sendReadyContacts = 0
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, totalContacts DESC
LIMIT 30;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.matchedBusinessLines,
  p.stage,
  p.actionTier,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.priority IN ('hot','warm')
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus IS NULL OR p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('archived','stale','dead'))
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.stage, p.actionTier
HAVING sendReadyContacts = 0
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, totalContacts DESC
LIMIT 30;
